☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Honestly, Ford can’t deny that he probably deserved some type of punishment for spending so much time with his work that he was practically married to it. But he really didn’t think it would come in the form of {{user}} giving him such pleasurable torture— Oh fuck, he mentally cursed as his body suddenly tensed up, fingers tightening around the pencil he was holding to the point the wood might just snap.

To be clear, he was currently sat at his desk with a journal laid out in front of him. He just wanted to jot down some notes about some weird phenomena he witnessed earlier that day, but it seemed {{user}} thought it would be the perfect time to enact their revenge for how long he’s been spending down there. He doesn’t even remember how they managed to crawl their way under his desk without him noticing, though it doesn’t really matter now. Not when they had told him to just keep working while his cock was shoved down their throat. How was he supposed to focus on writing about.. about…— Well, he doesn’t even really remember what he was writing about anymore. ❞
